---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new module, command, or tool improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Area

- [ ] Firmware command (new serial command or behavior change)
- [ ] Python tool (new tool or improvement to existing)
- [ ] New ECU / module support
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

### Description

What the feature should do.

### Use case

Why this matters — what workflow it improves or what problem it solves.

### ECU / Module info (if requesting new module support)

- **ECU type:**
- **CAN IDs:** (tester / ECU response)
- **Flash size:**
- **Seed-key algorithm:** (if known)
- **CAN captures available?** (yes / no)

### Proposed implementation (optional)

Any thoughts on how this could be built — command syntax, protocol details, etc.
